title: 438 TAKE OR LEAVE SIDING OR OTHER TRACK

title: 439 STOP
plain: Stop.

title: 440 DIRECTION INDICATOR
plain: Flashing arrow indicators used in conjunction with block signals; when illuminated, identify that the route at the next controlled location is displaying a permissive signal and the route is lined and secured as indicated by the direction of the arrow.

citation.verbatim: Direction Indicator — Flashing arrow indicators used in conjunction with block signals; when illuminated, identify that the route at the next controlled location is displaying a permissive signal and the route is lined and secured as indicated by the direction of the arrow.
